svg.title: 4-Channel Remote Ignitor — component-level schematic
svg.desc: Engineering schematic: 2S battery and BMS, MT3608 5V boost, ESP32-S3, optocoupler-isolated 4-channel relay, per-channel TVS protection and binding-post outputs.
svg.text: 1. Pre-set MT3608 to 5.00V before connecting ESP32/relay. 2. F1 fuses only the firing path (relay COM); the boost taps raw +7V4.
3. TVS D2-D5 cathode (stripe) faces the + binding post on every channel. 4. Relay H/L jumper set to match firmware (active-LOW).
5. C1 100uF bulk on +5V at ESP32; C2-C5 0.1uF on relay IN1-IN4. 6. GND common; 18AWG firing, 22AWG logic. NO1-4 joined by net name.
